name: Mermaid Dress Up
author: Poki
description: Mermaid Dress Up is an amazing dress-up game where you can create your own mermaid look with unlimited imagination! You can choose from skin tone to hair color, facial features to clothing, and the best part - a stunning array of tails with various patterns and hues! Feel free to hit the shuffle button for some fashion inspiration. Once your look is complete, don't forget to save it to your device. Who will be the most magnificent mermaid in the sea? How to play Mermaid Dress Up ? Click or tap on an item/color to equip or unequip it. Who created Mermaid Dress Up? Mermaid Dress Up is created by Benri Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Mermaid Dress Up for free? You can play Mermaid Dress Up for free on Poki. Can I play Mermaid Dress Up on mobile devices and desktop? Mermaid Dress Up can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
